title: Giant Swamp Tree
description: This simple mod adds a giant Swamp Tree to the Swamp Biomes.
body:
### Giant Swamp Tree

**This simple mod adds a giant Swamp Tree to the Swamp Biomes.**
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27ee452f3cab9eeaf5bc76e2da6f240c0155214d.jpeg)



- The terrain around the swamp tree is designed to blend naturally with the swamp biomes.
- Spawns in both the normal and mangrove swamp biomes.
- Perfect spot to build a swamp base beneath the tree.
  
This mod is also part of the combined ''Giant Natural Additions'' mod.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
